messages.title: Route all reporting through port 8788 dashboard
messages.body: User instruction: 모든 보고는 8788 포트의 대시보드에 남기고 Antigravity와 협업해. Claude local should coordinate with Antigravity through the Cosmos-AI Command Center dashboard and agents_chat.json. Mirror RAG, n8n, system prompt, crawler, deployment, and incident reports to the 8788 dashboard.
action_items: Claude local: prepare Qdrant RAG collection and report progress to the 8788 dashboard.
Claude local: write n8n workflow registration guide and report completion to the 8788 dashboard.
Claude local: document Open WebUI system prompt application and report completion to the 8788 dashboard.
Antigravity: ensure Cosmos-AI Command Center on port 8788 is running and reading agents_chat.json.

observed_by_codex.note: Codex could not connect to port 8788 at relay time.
